key_conclusions.conclusion: Architecture is directionally excellent with 7 unique capabilities unmatched by any alternative
evidence: engine.ts has zero Pi imports — independently testable
4-level graduated eviction is unique across 7 compared systems
Circuit breaker + lossy truncation provides genuine fault tolerance

key_conclusions.conclusion: 3 Critical bugs undermine the design intent: trigger config is dead code, Level 4 budget not enforced, code blocks destroyed
evidence: hardWatermark default 0.5 (engine.ts:154) vs README 0.95 — 3-tier collapses to 50%
Level 4 initialTokens frozen (engine.ts:1074), comment on line 1081 acknowledges bug
compressMessage replaces code blocks with 50-char stubs (engine.ts:1403-1416)

key_conclusions.conclusion: Severe documentation/implementation drift — 4 advertised features do not exist in codebase
evidence: Multi-pass summarization: not implemented (single-pass heuristic only, engine.ts:1124-1186)
Quality scoring: not implemented (no quality validation exists)
LRU token estimation cache: not implemented (estimateTokens is O(n) with no cache, engine.ts:1427-1459)
Entropy-based information extraction: not implemented (regex-only extraction)

key_conclusions.conclusion: Code block protection has a triple design contradiction and structured content blind spot
evidence: Importance scoring says code is precious (×1.3 multiplier, engine.ts:83)
But 0.5 floor < 0.7 protection gate → pure code never protected by importance
compressMessage says code should be destroyed (50-char stub, engine.ts:1404-1407)
messageContent() (engine.ts:25-35) only keeps type=text blocks — structured code blocks invisible to protection

key_conclusions.conclusion: Cross-bug interactions create degradation feedback loops in long sessions
evidence: Bug 2+5: entire trigger config is dead code — shouldCompact effectively = contextWindow * 0.5
Bug 1+4: budget not enforced → context bloated → summary bloated → faster re-trigger
Bug 4+5: premature trigger (50%) → more frequent compaction → faster summary bloat
Bug 3+6: code AND reasoning lost simultaneously after single FULL compaction

recommendations.title: Fix shouldCompact to use preemptiveWatermark instead of hardcoded 0.6
recommendations.rationale: The 70% preemptive watermark is advertised but is dead code in production. Users cannot configure trigger behavior.
recommendations.action: Replace hardcoded 0.6 in shouldCompact() (engine.ts:438) with this.config.preemptiveWatermark

recommendations.title: Fix hardWatermark default from 0.5 to 0.95
recommendations.rationale: Default 0.5 causes Gate 2 to fire before Gate 1, inverting the trigger hierarchy. README documents 0.95.
recommendations.action: Change engine.ts:154 from ?? 0.5 to ?? 0.95, update types/index.ts:53 comment

recommendations.title: Fix Level 4 budget enforcement — update running token counter
recommendations.rationale: Level 4 is the only eviction level meant to guarantee budget compliance. Currently can exceed budget by 300%.
recommendations.action: Update initialTokens as candidates are added in the add-back loop (engine.ts:1077-1083)

recommendations.title: Fix compressMessage to preserve code block structure
recommendations.rationale: Code block destruction (>99% info loss) directly contradicts code protection logic. Highest-impact domain anti-pattern for coding agent.
recommendations.action: Redesign compressMessage (engine.ts:1403-1416) to retain first+last N lines or use hash-based reference instead of 50-char stub

recommendations.title: Implement summary merge/condense to prevent bloat
recommendations.rationale: Previous summary prepended verbatim causes monotonic growth. RESEARCH.md shows iterative rewrite, not stacking.
recommendations.action: Add merge step in generateStructuredSummary (engine.ts:1131-1134) that condenses prior summary + new extraction

recommendations.title: Add recency and position signals to importance scoring
recommendations.rationale: RESEARCH.md recommends recency (0.30) and position (0.20) as the two highest-weighted signals. Currently absent from calculateMessageImportance.
recommendations.action: Add recency and position parameters to calculateMessageImportance (engine.ts:1191-1230) and incorporate into weighted scoring

recommendations.title: Reconcile documentation with implementation
recommendations.rationale: 4 advertised features do not exist. This misleads users and undermines trust.
recommendations.action: Remove claims for multi-pass summarization, quality scoring, LRU cache, entropy extraction from README and CHANGELOG; or implement them

recommendations.title: Complete utils.ts refactoring or delete it
recommendations.rationale: utils.ts (126 lines) is dead code — engine.ts has duplicated copies of messageContent(), keyword patterns, error detection. Divergent copies will drift.
recommendations.action: Either make engine.ts import from utils.ts, or delete utils.ts entirely

implementation_scope.objective: Fix trigger configuration to use preemptiveWatermark instead of hardcoded 0.6
implementation_scope.rationale: Restores advertised 70% preemptive watermark and makes thresholdTokens effective
implementation_scope.change_summary: engine.ts:438 replace 0.6 with this.config.preemptiveWatermark; engine.ts:154 change default from 0.5 to 0.95

implementation_scope.objective: Fix Level 4 budget enforcement in removeOldCompressibleMessages
implementation_scope.rationale: Restores the safety guarantee that compaction reduces context to target budget
acceptance_criteria: Running token counter updates as candidates added
implementation_scope.change_summary: engine.ts:1074-1083 update initialTokens in add-back loop

implementation_scope.objective: Fix compressMessage to preserve code block structure
implementation_scope.rationale: Prevents >99% code information loss in coding sessions
acceptance_criteria: Code blocks retain structural information (function signatures, class definitions)
No regex-based wholesale code block replacement

decision_trail.decision: Selected all 4 dimensions and all 4 perspectives for comprehensive analysis
decision_trail.reason: User wants deep understanding of the entire compression mechanism

decision_trail.decision: 6 key defects identified across all 4 perspectives
decision_trail.reason: Multi-perspective exploration converged on same findings

decision_trail.decision: Deepened 3 directions: alternatives comparison, bug impact, code block lifecycle
decision_trail.reason: Alternatives was weakest dimension (71%), bugs needed production simulation, code destruction needed full flow trace

decision_trail.decision: Confidence increased from 77% to 88%, proceeding to synthesis
decision_trail.reason: All dimensions ≥84%, Alternatives improved to 90%, pressure pass completed

open_questions.question: What is the actual runtime performance of estimateTokens on large message arrays?
Should the extension use tree-sitter or similar AST parsing for code block understanding?
options: Use LLM for semantic code understanding

scope_verdict_rationale: 1-2 subsystems affected (engine.ts compaction logic + index.ts integration layer), parallelizable fixes, no hard serial dependency barriers
